entries.title: FormBuilder admin index.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/form-builder in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews form definitions and their publication/status state.

entries.title: Create/edit form schema screen.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/form-builder in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An editor builds or adjusts a form schema, field types, validation, and notification settings.

entries.title: Submissions index.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/form-builder in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An administrator triages unread, spam, archived, and normal submissions.

entries.title: Frontend form output.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/form-builder in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: A visitor completes a seeded public form rendered through the frontend component.

entries.title: Submission detail view.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/form-builder in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An administrator reads a submission payload and reply context without exposing encrypted raw storage.
